language.title: Language
language.description: Select your preferred display language. The interface will update immediately.

modules.title: Feature Modules
modules.description: Enable or disable functional modules. Changes take effect after server restart.
modules.coreDesc: Essential modules that are always enabled.
modules.optionalDesc: Toggle these modules based on your needs.
modules.heavyDesc: These modules require MySQL and external services. Not available in SQLite mode.
modules.requiresRestart: Changes require server restart to take effect.
